The '''''Robber Baron''''' was a [[Star Galleon-class frigate|''Star Galleon''-class]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] owned by the infamous [[Poss'Nomin]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], [[Reginald Barkbone]].

Barkbone stole the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] from its previous owner and equipped it with [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] [[Corsair/Legends|corsairs]]. The ship was pursued by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Rufaan Tigellinus]] from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] to the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies Region]].
